merged_events.event_description: Diplomatic relations and the American Embassy at Kingston were established upon U.S. recognition of Jamaican independence, with Irving G. Cheslaw as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

evidence.quote: Diplomatic relations and the American Embassy at Kingston were established on August 16, 1962, with Irving G. Cheslaw as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

matched.notes: Perfect match. Both record the establishment of the American Embassy at Kingston on 1962-08-16 upon U.S. recognition of Jamaican independence. High-confidence RDCR source with verified citation.
